title: MD-2 medical droid

The '''MD-2''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] and a part of the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]] that was manufactured by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]]. It was slightly [[Humanoid/Legends|humanoid]] in appearance.

This [[Droid/Legends|droid]] model had an extensive knowledge of chemistry and was used as an anesthesiologist assistant with specialized appendages for the task.

==Description==
Constructed and marketed by [[Industrial Automaton/Legends|Industrial Automaton]],<ref name="SWS" /> the MD-2 was a [[Class one droid/Legends|class one droid]],<ref name="Arms" /> part of series of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droids]] designated as the [[MD-series medical droid/Legends|MD-series]].<ref name="SWS" /> The MD-2, like other variant productions of the MD-series, was similar in design to the [[2-1B surgical droid/Legends|2-1B surgical droid]], another of Industrial Automaton's products.<ref name="Droids" /> Standing at a height of 1.5 [[Meter/Legends|Imperial standard meters]], the MD-2 had a cranial unit attached to a torso with two [[Limb/Legends|arms]].<ref name="FF" /> The lower half of the droid was bipedal<ref name="Arms" /> with the internal mechanisms protected by a surgical gown.<ref name="Droids" /> MD-2 droids were ambidextrous.<ref name="Arms" />

[[Color/Legends|Gray]] plating generally covered MD-series droids, highlighted in green with yellow [[Photoreceptor/Legends|photoreceptors]].<ref name="FF" /> MD-2s cost 2,000 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]] to buy, and were commonly available for purchase throughout [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="Arms" /> The torso also contained a connection socket located on the lower half to allow the droid to directly connect to a [[Computer/Legends|computer]].<ref name="Droids" />

==Role==
[[File:MD-2_anesthesiologist.jpg|thumb|left|160px|An MD-2's breath mask appendage]]
MD-2 droids were intended for use as anaesthesiologists, and were equipped with [[Breath mask/Legends|breath masks]] and [[anaesthetic dispenser]]s on their hands. MD-2 droids monitored vital functions during surgery and controlled circulation, respiration and nervous system.<ref name="SWS" />

==History==
Constructed on the [[droid factory]] [[Planet/Legends|world]] of [[Telti/Legends|Telti]],<ref name="Droids" /> they were employed by the Empire during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Aboard the Imperial [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] ''[[Far Orbit]]'', an MD-2 droid was responsible for assisting the MD-4 droid with surgery, as well as consulting with the MD-1 over laboratory matters.<ref name="FO">''[[The Far Orbit Project]]''</ref> MD-2 droids were also part of the medical complement about the [[Luxury liner/Legends|luxury liner]] [[Kuari Princess/Legends|''Kuari Princess'']]. They served alongside the head nurse, [[Calfta Bongi]].<ref name="RM">[[Riders of the Maelstrom (adventure)|''Riders of the Maelstrom'']]</ref>
